description: Stylish and comfortable, this analog wrist watch from fastrack& rsquo s basics Collection is designed for those who love their everyday accessories. Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Round & bull Metallic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Bezel with markings from 5 to 25 minutes and 35 to 55 minutes & bull Plastic strap with perforations for breathability, and a tang clasp for comfort and style & bull White dial with Arabic numbering, brand name above 6 o& rsquo clock, brand logo below the 12 o& rsquo clock marking and 5-minute marking with 15, 30, 45 and 60 markings in compass style & bull Quartz movement of time display with carved out hands & bull Screw to reset time & bull Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability & bull Water resistant up to 50 meters, which helps you wear it when swimming
